title: Plutarch, Moralia: The E at Delphi
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: The E at Delphi.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: The E at Delphi.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'The E at Delphi': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
